result:
All citations verified accurate. Here is the complete inventory:

---

## oCMS Cache Layer Inventory

---

### Architecture overview

The cache system is built around a **single `Cache` interface** (`internal/cache/interface.go:12-36`) with two backends (memory and Redis), plus six **domain-specific in-memory caches** all coordinated by a **`Manager`** singleton. The Manager is constructed once in `initCacheManager` (`cmd/ocms/main.go:732-762`) and injected into every handler and service that needs it.

---

### 1. `General` — miscellaneous short-lived data

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Owner** | `internal/cache/cache.go` (`SimpleCache`) |
| **Constructed at** | `manager.go:72` — `New(5 * time.Minute)` |
| **Env vars / defaults** | None specific; inherits `OCMS_CACHE_MAX_SIZE` (`10000`) |
| **TTL** | **5 minutes** (hard-coded in `NewManager`) |
| **Invalidation** | Background cleanup goroutine every 1 minute (`manager.go:122`) + per-entry TTL; also wiped by `ClearAll()` (`manager.go:194`) |
| **Consumers** | Misc internal use; cleared via Admin UI at `/admin/cache` |

---

### 2. `Config` — site configuration key-value pairs

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Owner** | `internal/cache/config.go:14-197` |
| **Constructed at** | `manager.go:66` |
| **Env vars / defaults** | Inherits `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` (`3600` s, i.e. 1 h) |
| **TTL** | **1 hour** (`config.go:31`) — but in practice never expires by TTL alone; the cache tracks a single "loaded" flag and reloads on next access after invalidation |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidateConfig()` (`manager.go:195`), alias `InvalidateThemeSettings()` (`manager.go:206`); also `ClearAll()` |
| **Consumers** | `handler/config.go:392` (after config save), `handler/themes.go:116,216` (theme activate / settings save), `handler/frontend.go:2124+` (runtime config lookups — site name, URL, etc.), `service/events.go` via `SetGlobalConfigGetter` (`main.go:1326`) |

---

### 3. `Sitemap` — generated sitemap XML

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Owner** | `internal/cache/sitemap.go:15-168` |
| **Constructed at** | `manager.go:67` — `NewSitemapCache(queries, time.Hour)` |
| **Env vars / defaults** | Inherits `OCMS_CACHE_TTL`; the constructor receives `time.Hour` explicitly (`manager.go:67`) |
| **TTL** | **1 hour** (`sitemap.go:32`); checked on every `Get()` call (`sitemap.go:45`) |
| **Invalidation** | TTL expiry on Get; explicit `Manager.InvalidateSitemap()` (`manager.go:200`), `InvalidateContent()` (`manager.go:212`), `InvalidatePage()` (`manager.go:222`), `InvalidatePages()` (`manager.go:228`); `ClearAll()` |
| **Consumers** | `handler/frontend.go:1484` (serves `/sitemap.xml`) |

---

### 4. `Menus` — menu structures by slug

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Owner** | `internal/cache/menus.go:22-189` |
| **Constructed at** | `manager.go:68` |
| **Env vars / defaults** | Inherits `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` (1 h default) |
| **TTL** | **1 hour** (`menus.go:36`) — reloads entire menu set on invalidation, not entry-by-entry TTL |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidateMenus()` (`manager.go:234`); `ClearAll()`; admin UI `/admin/cache/clear/menus` (`handler/cache.go:157`) |
| **Consumers** | `internal/service/menu.go:50` (MenuService.GetMenu checks cache before querying DB), template function `getMenu` via `render.go` |

---

### 5. `Language` — language definitions

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Owner** | `internal/cache/languages.go:14-220` |
| **Constructed at** | `manager.go:69` |
| **Env vars / defaults** | Inherits `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` (1 h default) |
| **TTL** | **1 hour** (`languages.go:31`) |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidateLanguages()` (`manager.go:240`); language CRUD handlers; `ClearAll()`; admin UI `/admin/cache/clear/languages` (`handler/cache.go:172`) |
| **Consumers** | Multi-language middleware, frontend handler, theme rendering, anywhere `GetActiveLanguages` / `GetByCode` is called |

---

### 6. `Translation` — entity translation maps

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Owner** | `internal/cache/translations.go:26-273` |
| **Constructed at** | `manager.go:70` |
| **Env vars / defaults** | None specific; max entries hard-coded to `10000` (`translations.go:45`) |
| **TTL** | **30 minutes** (`translations.go:41,44`) |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidateTranslation(entityType, id)` (`manager.go:251`) for single entity; `Manager.InvalidateTranslations()` (`manager.go:246`) for full flush; capacity-based eviction of 50% entries when max hit (`translations.go:45,217-232`); `ClearAll()` |
| **Consumers** | Pages, menus, categories, and any handler that resolves a translated slug |

---

### 7. `Page` — published pages by slug / ID (context-aware)

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Owner** | `internal/cache/pages.go:16-231` |
| **Constructed at** | `manager.go:71` |
| **Env vars / defaults** | Inherits `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` (1 h default) |
| **TTL** | **1 hour** (`pages.go:35`) |
| **Cache key** | `{lang}:{role}:{slug}` or `{lang}:{role}:{id}` — defined in `cache/context.go:1-62` |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidatePage(id)` removes all language×role variants for that ID (`manager.go:219`); `Manager.InvalidatePages()` / `InvalidateContent()` flush all pages; `ClearAll()`; admin UI `/admin/cache/clear/pages` (`handler/cache.go:142`) |
| **Consumers** | `handler/frontend.go:835` (slug-based page rendering), `handler/frontend.go:1083` (ID-based page rendering) |

---

### 8. `Distributed` — Redis (optional backend for the above)

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Owner** | `internal/cache/redis.go:15-315` |
| **Env vars / defaults** | `OCMS_REDIS_URL` (empty → disabled); `OCMS_CACHE_PREFIX` (`"ocms:"`); `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` (`3600` s) |
| **TTL** | Configurable per `Set()` call; default from `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` |
| **Invalidation** | `Delete(ctx, key)`, `Clear(ctx)` (SCAN+DEL pattern), `DeleteByPrefix(ctx, prefix)`; TTL expiry at Redis server |
| **Consumers** | Currently wired as `Manager.Distributed` (`manager.go:54`); individual domain caches do **not** route through it — it exists as an optional extra backend. The `TypedCache[T]` wrapper (`cache/typed.go:14-137`) provides generic `GetOrSet` over any `Cache` implementor |
| **Fallback** | If Redis connection fails at startup, `FallbackToMemory: true` (`main.go:741`) causes silent fallback to memory; logged as a warning |

---

### Configuration summary

All four env vars are in `internal/config/config.go:35-39`:

```
OCMS_REDIS_URL       ""        No Redis (memory-only)
OCMS_CACHE_PREFIX    "ocms:"   Redis key prefix
OCMS_CACHE_TTL       3600      Default TTL (seconds) → 1 hour
OCMS_CACHE_MAX_SIZE  10000     Max entries for MemoryCache
```

`cfg.UseRedisCache()` returns `true` iff `RedisURL != ""` (`config.go:104-106`), which flips `cacheConfig.Type` to `"redis"` (`main.go:743-744`).

---

### Invalidation trigger map

| Event | Cache(s) cleared | Code location |
|-------|-----------------|---------------|
| Config value saved | Config | `handler/config.go:392` |
| Theme activated | Config | `handler/themes.go:116` |
| Theme settings saved | Config | `handler/themes.go:216` |
| Page created/updated/deleted | Page + Sitemap | `handler/pages.go:127` |
| Bulk page ops | Page + Sitemap | `Manager.InvalidateContent()` |
| Menu CRUD | Menus | `Manager.InvalidateMenus()` |
| Language CRUD | Language | `Manager.InvalidateLanguages()` |
| Translation CRUD | Translation (entity) | `Manager.InvalidateTranslation()` |
| Admin "Clear all" UI | All caches | `handler/cache.go:107` |
| Domain-specific "Clear X" UI | One cache | `handler/cache.go:112-183` |
| Application restart | All (memory) | N/A — memory is not persisted |
